Prop Challenge Simulator

Simple Monte Carlo runs with only the essentials.

Default strategy assumptions are 50% win rate, 1:1 risk:reward, and 1% risk per trade based on initial balance. Change them if needed.

Smart mode dynamically selects RR, mathematical WR (WR = 1/(1+RR)), risk, and trades/day while enforcing trailing drawdown updates only at end-of-day plus a daily consistency cap.

Trailing drawdown is enabled. Keep all required thresholds as percentages (Success Target %, Fail Limit %, Risk Per Trade %).

Heatmap mode calculates pass rate playoffs across fixed mathematical WR↔RR pairs (WR = 1 / (1 + RR)). Green is higher pass rate, red is lower.

Simulation Paths

Outcome Breakdown
